Devilkin.name: 魔裔 Devilkin
Devilkin.description:
你生来就对自己的创造具有出乎意料的魔法影响力。你的外表显露出一些明显征兆，迷信的人会将这些征兆与位面生物联系起来——绯红的皮肤、无用的翅膀或角、爬行动物般的眼睛。你对光的厌恶以及对火元素的超自然抗性，更让人难以打消你其实是真正恶魔的想法。

You were born with unexpected magical influence over your creation. Your physical appearance shows tell-tale signs that the superstitious associate with planar beings- crimson flesh, ineffective wings or horns, reptilian eyes. Your dislike of light and preternatural resistance to fire does little to dissuade people from thinking you are an actual devil.

Dwarven.name: 矮人 Dwarven
Dwarven.description:
和你的父母一样，你生来便拥有矮人持久的坚韧。你结实的身材与魁梧的体格外貌，正是一个生于大地与岩石的民族的标志。身体坚韧的传承由你继承，因为在你的胸膛中，跳动着一颗石之心。

Like your parents before you, you were born with the enduring fortitude of the Dwarves. Your stout stature and burly physical appearance are the hallmarks of a people born of earth and stone. A legacy of physical resilience is yours to inherit, for in your breast beats a heart of stone.

Elvish.name: 精灵语 Elvish
Elvish.description:
你的移动优雅，思维敏捷；你生来便是一名长寿的精灵。你轻盈灵巧的身形与雕琢般的五官，是一个将优雅视为生活方式的族群所传承下来的特质。你天生倾向于快速思考与精确的移动，这是数百年传统演化而来的结果。

Graceful in movement and swift in thought, you were born a long-lived elf. Your slight and nimble frame and sculpted features are the inherited traits of a people for whom elegance is a way of life. Your predisposition toward quick-thinking and precise movement the evolutionary results of hundreds of years of tradition.

Giantkin.name: 巨人裔 Giantkin
Giantkin.description:
元素之力主宰了你的诞生，赋予你超自然的活力。你高大的身躯和强健的体格常常让别人以为你只是个不动脑子的肌肉块，但你的族群最为人所知的，是他们强健的体魄与深厚的知识。你继承了群山的力量。

Elemental forces presided over your birth, instilling you with supernatural vigor. Your large frame and muscular build often lead others to believe you are an unthinking mass of muscle, but yours is a people known most for their physical resilience and the deep well of their knowledge. You have inherited the strength of mountains.

Gnome.name: 侏儒 Gnome
Gnome.description:
你的诞生伴随着热烈欢腾的庆祝。你娇小的身躯与精致的面容，伴随着一种近乎超自然的探索天赋。你的族群传统崇尚对生命的热爱，以及敏捷思考与迅速行动的重要性。

Yours was a birth of exuberant celebration. Your diminutive body and delicate features are paired with an almost supernatural propensity for discovery. The traditions of your people embrace a lust for life and the importance of quick-thinking and quick-action.

Halfling.name: 半身人 Halfling
Halfling.description:
你在育婴堂中长大，身边环绕着其他半身人。你那小巧的身材、长满毛发的厚脚掌，以及敏捷的思维与身手，正是你的族群最为人所知的特征。对你的族群而言，教育与传统至关重要。

You were raised in a creche surrounded by other halflings. Your lilliputian stature, thick-soled hairy feet, and the swiftness of your mind and body are what your people are most known for. Yours is a people for whom education and tradition are paramount.

Human.name: 人类 Human
Human.description:
你出生于无数境况与遥远各地之间，是一名始终善于适应的人类。无论高矮、纤瘦、强壮还是圆胖，你的外貌若说有什么特点，那就是多种多样。人类最为人所知的是其基因中对决心的先天倾向，以及那些推动着顽强求生意志的传统。

Found amid countless conditions and far-flung places, you were born an ever-adaptable human. Tall or short, thin, muscular, or rotund, your physical appearance is nothing if not varied. Humans are most known for a genetic predisposition toward determination, with traditions that drive a stubborn will to survive.

Orcish.name: 兽人语 Orcish
Orcish.description:
你的诞生被一个骄傲而坚韧民族的星象与传统所标记。你高大且匀称的身躯，以及天生坚韧的体质，起源于一个暴露在严酷北方气候无情磨炼之下的民族。你的族人最为人所知的，首先是他们的力量与韧性。

Your birth was marked by the stars and traditions of a proud and enduring people. Your tall and well-toned body and natural propensity for toughness has origins amid a people exposed to the relentless struggle of a harsh northern clime. Your people are known for their strength and resilience above all else.
